_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the rpa-workstation-in-use scenario. The agent chains folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> jobs history -> jobs list (concurrency) -> machines list --all-fields. Discriminating evidence: WS-CLIENT-07 is a Windows client (single interactive session) but its template grants unattendedSlots=3, and a concurrent job (HourlySync) was Running on the same host when DailyExtract faulted with 'workstation is in use by another user'. Specific rules precede generic ones (first-match-wins).

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
